unskilled-hireling.name: Unskilled Hireling
unskilled-hireling.description: An untrained laborer hired by the day for simple manual work (porters, diggers, rowers). They avoid danger and won't fight.

trained-hireling.name: Trained Hireling
trained-hireling.description: A hireling trained in a relevant skill or Lore (a guide, scribe, sailor, or artisan). Cost scales with the rarity and danger of the work.

spellcasting-service.name: Spellcasting Service
spellcasting-service.price: by spell rank (≈ rank × level cost)
spellcasting-service.description: Pay an NPC spellcaster to cast a spell for you (a heal, restoration, raise dead, teleport, etc.). The price is set by the spell's rank — uncommon/rare spells and costly material components add to it. Many require time to prepare.

healing-service.name: Healing & Restoration
healing-service.description: Temple or guild spellcasting to restore Hit Points, remove a condition (Treat Disease, restoration), or neutralize poison. Costs follow the Spellcasting Service price for the spell's rank.

lodging-poor.name: Lodging (Poor)
lodging-poor.description: A spot on a common-room floor or a shared bunk. Crowded and cheap.

lodging-common.name: Lodging (Common)
lodging-common.description: A private room at a typical inn, with a meal included at most establishments.

lodging-fine.name: Lodging (Fine)
lodging-fine.description: A well-appointed suite at a fine establishment, with service, baths, and quality meals.

ship-passage.name: Ship Passage
ship-passage.description: Passage aboard a vessel along a coast or river. A private cabin and fast routes cost more; deck passage on a cargo run is cheapest.

carriage-fare.name: Coach / Carriage Fare
carriage-fare.description: A seat on an overland coach or a hired carriage between settlements. Private hire and rough roads raise the fare.

messenger.name: Courier / Messenger
messenger.description: Hire a runner or rider to carry a letter or small package; magical sending services (via a spell) cost far more.

access-library.name: Library / Archive Access
access-library.description: Paid access to a library or archive to support a Research downtime activity. Prestigious or restricted collections cost more and may require sponsorship.

mount-rental.name: Mount Rental
mount-rental.description: Rent a riding horse, pony, or pack animal by the day. Purchase prices for animals are higher (see a stable).
